loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate event counts and worst-case THD from outgoing feeders; per-phase THD columns (thd_current_*, thd_voltage_*) are not logged on the panel stub table, so per-phase breakdowns are honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing per-panel THD and power metrics from outgoing feeders; some feeders (Axial Fan Panel-1, Axial Fan Panel-2, Frisking+Security) are dark (no data) and will render as blanks.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing AI narrative summary for PCC-2A outgoing feeders; per-member THD/power stats are populated from member meters where available (some members have no data and are omitted from the narrative).

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder PQ metrics (iThd, vThd, pf) from the 21 outgoing feeders; panel-level aggregate columns are not directly logged on the stub table, so values are resolved via member fan-out. Some feeders (Axial Fan Panel-1, Axial Fan Panel-2, Frisking+Security) have no recent data and will render blank.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing harmonic distribution (H5, H7, I-THD, V-THD) and power for panel feeders; 3rd harmonic, K-factor, and peak-THD columns are not measured by this meter's member tables.
